overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a walk through Night City's industrial district. The clip begins in a sunny golden-hour highway underpass with refinery towers visible, transitions through a sudden heavy rainstorm, and continues through wet streets lined with digital billboards and homeless encampments before crossing a busy intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial highway underpass with refinery view

events.description: crossing the street at intersection, moving from sidewalk to crosswalk and back

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the highway overpass toward the intersection

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the road parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure with thick support pillars creating partial cover
large industrial complex with spherical storage tanks and tall smokestacks against the sky
green metal guardrail separating the pedestrian sidewalk from the vehicle road
green suspended street sign with white text indicating El Camino Real
green street sign on metal pole indicating MLK Blvd at the corner
yellow striped pedestrian crossing on the asphalt road surface

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a massive highway overpass in an industrial district, with large refinery towers visible in the golden-hour sunlight. The camera moves forward along a concrete sidewalk bordered by a green guardrail, approaching an intersection marked by street signs for El Camino Real and MLK Blvd. The player crosses the street at a crosswalk around the 14-second mark while a futuristic vehicle passes by on the road.

events.description: weather suddenly changes from clear to heavy rain with visible rain streaks and wet surfaces

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk as heavy rain begins to fall, passing under the overpass protection

notable_agents.action: two distant figures walking along the opposite sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: homeless encampment with tarp shelters, blankets, and scattered belongings tucked under the overpass
red and white striped concrete barriers blocking off the encampment area
heavy rainfall visible as diagonal streaks falling through the air and splashing on surfaces

segments.scene_description: As the player continues walking, the weather abruptly shifts at 22 seconds from sunny to a heavy downpour. The scene remains under the highway overpass, now revealing a makeshift homeless encampment with tarp shelters and concrete barriers on the right side. Rain streaks fill the air while the industrial refinery and street signs from the previous segment fall behind.

agents.ego_description: walking along the rain-soaked sidewalk past illuminated digital billboards and street lights

notable_agents.action: solitary figure walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: large illuminated digital advertisement for NiCola beverage with distinctive logo
digital advertisement display showing Real Water branding with neon lighting
rain-soaked concrete sidewalk with reflective puddles and wet sheen
tall modern street lamps casting warm light through the rain

segments.scene_description: Moving out from under the overpass into the open rain, the player walks along a commercial sidewalk lined with tall street lamps and large digital billboards advertising NiCola and Real Water. The pavement is visibly wet and reflective. A pedestrian walks toward the camera from the opposite direction while the highway overpass recedes into the background on the right.

events.description: crossing the wide intersection at the crosswalk while traffic waits at the light
slight turn to the right while continuing forward across the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet asphalt intersection, navigating around vehicles and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: black futuristic sedan stopped at the red traffic light waiting to proceed
person holding an umbrella standing at the street corner waiting to cross

entered.detail: massive vertical digital billboard prominently displaying the NiCola advertisement
broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing on the wet asphalt
large building facade with distinctive red neon arrow lights and geometric patterns
green street sign indicating Santa Rosa mounted on a pole

segments.scene_description: The final segment features the player crossing a large, busy intersection in the pouring rain. A massive digital NiCola billboard dominates the right side while a futuristic building with red neon lights looms ahead. The player navigates the crosswalk as vehicles wait at the traffic light and pedestrians with umbrellas gather at the corners. The highway overpass now appears on the left as the path curves slightly.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through an industrial district that transforms from a sunny golden-hour afternoon into a heavy, neon-lit rainstorm. It begins under a massive highway overpass, moving along a concrete sidewalk past refinery towers and crossing an intersection at El Camino Real and MLK Blvd as a futuristic vehicle passes by. As the camera continues forward, the weather abruptly shifts into a downpour, revealing a makeshift homeless encampment of tarp shelters and concrete barriers beneath the overpass. The scene then opens into the rain-slicked streets, where the camera passes reflective pavements and towering digital billboards advertising NiCola and Real Water. Finally, the path leads across a busy intersection dominated by red neon lights and massive advertisements, with pedestrians holding umbrellas and vehicles waiting at the traffic light.
